task_title: Audio System — Chiptune Music + SFX + Pokemon Cries
approach_summary: Full spec implementation (Approach B) with conservative risk mitigations: SSR guards on all Web Audio API usage, pure-Node WAV generation (no new runtime deps), file splitting to stay under 150 lines, all AudioManager methods wrapped in try/catch.

files_to_create.purpose: CryParams interface (audio-specific, richer than PokemonTypes.CryParams), CRY_PARAMS map for all 21 species, synthesizeCry() Web Audio builder
Track definitions: TITLE_THEME, PALLET_TOWN, ROUTE_1, POKEMON_CENTER (looping overworld music)
Track definitions: WILD_BATTLE, TRAINER_BATTLE, GYM_BATTLE, VICTORY_FANFARE, BADGE_FANFARE (battle + fanfares)
Barrel file: re-exports TrackDefinition type and all 9 TRACK_DEFINITIONS from sub-files
SFX file mapping: 13 SFX IDs to public/assets/sfx/*.wav paths for Howler.js
Singleton audio manager: playMusic, stopMusic, playSFX, playCry, volume controls, first-gesture unlock, SSR guard
Node.js CLI entry: orchestrates WAV file generation, writes 14 files to public/assets/sfx/
Helper functions: encodeWav(), squareWave(), sawtoothWave(), triangleWave(), noiseWave(), applyEnvelope(), frequencySweep() — pure Node.js PCM synthesis
Unit tests: AudioManager singleton, playMusic/stopMusic with mocked Tone, playSFX no-op before gesture, playCry with mocked AudioContext, volume settings
Unit tests: all 21 species have CRY_PARAMS entries, each has required fields, synthesizeCry produces valid AudioBuffer mock
Unit tests: all 9 tracks defined in TRACK_DEFINITIONS, each track has bpm + notes array, notes have correct schema

changes: Add audio.playMusic('title-theme') at TITLE phase start in start()
Add audio.playSFX('encounter-flash') + audio.playMusic('wild-battle') when encounter transition begins
Add audio.playCry(wildPokemon.speciesId) when BATTLE phase sets up
Add audio.playMusic appropriate track on WARP completion
Add audio.playSFX('badge-get') when BADGE_CEREMONY phase starts
After processTurn() in handleMoveMenu(), scan events for DAMAGE (effectiveness-based SFX), FAINT, EXP_GAIN, LEVEL_UP, CATCH_ATTEMPT, CATCH_RESULT events and call appropriate playSFX()
Trigger it once on first keydown/touchstart
Call AudioManager.getInstance().playSFX('menu-select') on cursor movement and selection
In update() charIndex advancement, call playSFX('text-blip') throttled to 1/100ms via lastBlipTime module variable

steps.title: Create src/game/audio/cry-params.ts
steps.action: Define AudioCryParams interface, CRY_PARAMS for 21 species, synthesizeCry() function

steps.title: Create chiptune track sub-files
steps.action: Create src/game/audio/tracks/overworld-tracks.ts and battle-tracks.ts with note sequence data

steps.title: Create src/game/audio/chiptune-tracks.ts

steps.title: Create src/game/engine/AudioManager.ts
steps.action: Singleton with Tone.js music playback, Howler.js SFX, Web Audio cry synthesis, SSR guards, try/catch on all methods

steps.title: Create scripts/sfx-synth.mjs
steps.action: Pure Node.js PCM synthesis helpers and WAV encoder

steps.title: Create scripts/generate-sfx.mjs
steps.action: Main script orchestrating SFX generation, update package.json scripts

steps.title: Run generate-sfx script

steps.title: Modify GameEngine.ts
steps.action: Add AudioManager integration: music on map load, encounter SFX, battle cry, badge fanfare

steps.title: Modify BattleSystem.ts
steps.action: Add SFX calls after processTurn() event scanning

steps.title: Modify DialogSystem.ts
steps.action: Add throttled text-blip SFX on char advancement

steps.title: Write tests
steps.action: Create tests for AudioManager, CRY_PARAMS, TRACK_DEFINITIONS

expected_tests: AudioManager: playSFX is no-op when audioContextUnlocked=false
AudioManager: playMusic does not throw (Tone mocked)
AudioManager: playCry handles invalid speciesId gracefully
CRY_PARAMS: each entry has baseFreq, modFreq, modDepth, duration, waveType, envelope
synthesizeCry: returns non-null when AudioContext is available
TRACK_DEFINITIONS: each track has bpm > 0 and notes.length >= 1
TRACK_DEFINITIONS: each note has pitch (string|null), duration (string), instrument
TRACK_DEFINITIONS: loop tracks have at least 32 notes (8 bars × 4 beats)
SFX_FILES: all 13 SFX IDs map to non-empty file paths

risk_areas.mitigation: Dynamic import inside AudioManager init: typeof window check guards all Tone.js usage; AudioManager.getInstance() returns no-op stub on server
Same typeof window guard; Howler is only imported client-side

The audio module defines its own AudioCryParams (exported as CryParams from audio module). Import with alias where both are needed: import type { CryParams as AudioCryParams } from '../audio/cry-params'
Split into sub-files: tracks/overworld-tracks.ts + tracks/battle-tracks.ts, barrel in chiptune-tracks.ts
Use pure Node.js Buffer-based PCM synthesis and WAV encoding — no external runtime deps

risk_areas.risk: AudioManager browser-only APIs in test environment
risk_areas.mitigation: Mock Tone.js and Howler.js in tests using vi.mock(); AudioContext mocked in jsdom environment

risk_areas.risk: GameEngine.ts already 418 lines, adding audio increases it further
risk_areas.mitigation: Extract audio integration into a private helper method in GameEngine; keep additions minimal

risk_areas.risk: Tone.js Part/Transport API changes in v14
risk_areas.mitigation: Verify API against installed version; use Tone.Sequence or Tone.Part which are stable in v14.x

persistence_strategy: Volume settings stored in localStorage as 'audioMusicVolume' (default 0.7) and 'audioSFXVolume' (default 0.8). AudioManager reads these on init. No other audio state needs to survive page refresh (music restarts on page load, which is expected behavior).
error_handling_approach: All AudioManager public methods wrapped in try/catch with console.warn() — never throw. AudioContextUnlocked flag prevents silent failure before user gesture. Missing SFX files: Howler logs its own error, game continues silently. Tone.js synthesis errors: caught and logged, music stops gracefully.
